name: Tropical Double Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Prepare Devil's food cake according to package instructions.
3. Mix in instant vanilla pudding until well combined.
4. Add light sour cream and melted chocolate chips to the batter.
5. Fold in purée of raspberries.
6. Pour mixture into a greased baking dish.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow cake to cool completely before serving.
